current.headline: Vozinha's save count becomes Cape Verde's survival signal
current.summary: Cape Verde's goalkeeper is central to the Argentina matchup because a high save total would point to sustained pressure, while a lower number could mean Argentina finish early or Cape Verde limit clean looks.

items.headline: Cape Verde's keeper performance against Spain keeps save props alive
items.summary: Vozinha's previous knockout workload gives bettors a real reference point for whether Argentina can force five or more official saves.
